userStories.title: Complete task
userStories.description: The server 87.99.158.18 is running Traefik by mistake. SSH in as root and fix it: stop and remove all containers, then run: docker run -d --name reeve-agent --restart unless-stopped -p 127.0.0.1:8080:8080 -v reeve-memory:/data nousresearch/hermes-agent:latest. Check if the image exists first with docker pull. Report what is running.
acceptanceCriteria: All work described in the prompt is complete
userStories.notes: Traefik stopped and removed. reeve-agent running on 127.0.0.1:8080.
